name: polarchat
description: PolarChat - A privacy-first, end-to-end encrypted chat application. No tracking. No logs. No compromise.

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "cd electron && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.desktop:prepare: npm run build && npm run build:electron
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:prepare && cd electron && npm run pack
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare && cd electron && npm run dist
scripts.desktop:win: npm run desktop:prepare && cd electron && npm run dist:win
scripts.desktop:mac: npm run desktop:prepare && cd electron && npm run dist:mac
scripts.desktop:linux: npm run desktop:prepare && cd electron && npm run dist:linux
scripts.desktop:all: npm run desktop:prepare && cd electron && npm run dist:all
